{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Seishen Empire
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has no contact with the [[Seishen Empire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Saeya]] fought against the [[Seishen Empire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
